headline: Will DTE’s New Gas Leader and Reaffirmed Dividend Reshape Its Long‑Term Strategy (DTE)?
summary: DTE Energy recently announced that Renee Tomina will become president and chief operating officer of DTE Gas, succeeding retiring veteran Robert Richard, while the board also reaffirmed its quarterly US$1.165 dividend per share payable in October 2026. The leadership change comes as DTE Gas oversees the replacement of more than 4,000 miles of natural gas infrastructure across Michigan, reinforcing management’s focus on system reliability, safety and long-term modernization.
